stories.title: Wembanyama Exits Spurs-76ers Game With Rib Injury — MVP Eligibility Now in Jeopardy

x_posts.label: Post 1-1
x_posts.text:
Victor Wembanyama left Monday's game in the 2nd quarter with a left rib contusion.

17 pts. 5 reb. 3 blk. Then he was gone.

He needs 20+ minutes in one of his final 3 games to qualify for MVP. Status unknown.

#HoopHeroes #Spurs

x_posts.label: Post 1-2
x_posts.text:
Wemby is hurt. SGA is -260 for MVP.

If Wembanyama misses his last 3 games, he could be ineligible for every award he was a finalist for.

The most cruel timing in recent memory for a 22-year-old who redefined basketball.

#HoopHeroes #NBA #MVP

stories.title: Jokic 35/13/13 — Nuggets Rally From 16 Down in Q4 to Win in OT, 33rd Triple-Double

x_posts.label: Post 2-1
x_posts.text:
Nikola Jokic: 35 points. 13 rebounds. 13 assists.

Denver was down 16 in the 4th quarter. Then Jokic happened.

Nuggets win 137-132 in overtime. His 33rd triple-double. Denver moves ahead of the Lakers.

#HoopHeroes #Nuggets

x_posts.label: Post 2-2
x_posts.text:
Down 16 in Q4. Won in OT. Jokic with 35/13/13.

This is his 33rd triple-double this season. He's one of the greatest players in NBA history and people are STILL sleeping on him.

#HoopHeroes #Nuggets #NBA

stories.title: Memphis Grizzlies Match NBA Record With 29 Three-Pointers — Still Lose 142-126 to Cavaliers

x_posts.label: Post 3-1
x_posts.text:
Memphis made 29 three-pointers Monday night.

That TIES the NBA single-game record shared by Milwaukee (2020) and Boston (2024).

They still lost 142-126. To the Cavaliers. NBA is wild.

#HoopHeroes #NBA

x_posts.label: Post 3-2
x_posts.text:
9 different Grizzlies made a 3-pointer last night.

29 makes. 49% from deep. NBA record tied.

Still lost by 16. Somewhere, analytics people are screaming into a pillow.

#HoopHeroes #Grizzlies

stories.title: Knicks 108-105 Hawks — Brunson 30/13 in East Playoff Seeding Battle

x_posts.label: Post 4
x_posts.text:
Jalen Brunson: 30 points and 13 assists in a 108-105 Knicks win.

KAT added 21 points, 12 rebounds, and 6 assists.

New York doing exactly what they need to do with one week left. 🔥

#HoopHeroes #Knicks

stories.title: Magic 123-107 Pistons — Banchero 31 Points as Orlando Fights for East Play-In Spot

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text:
Paolo Banchero dropped 31 points on the No. 1 seed Pistons last night.

Desmond Bane added 25. Magic win 123-107.

Orlando is NOT going away quietly. 🔥

#HoopHeroes #Magic

stories.title: OKC vs. Spurs — No. 1 Seed Race Final Stretch With Wemby Injury Adding Drama

x_posts.label: Post 6
x_posts.text:
OKC holds the No. 1 seed in the West. Spurs are No. 2.

Now Wemby is hurt and San Antonio faces a brutal choice: protect their star for the playoffs or chase the seed?

Five games left. Every decision matters.

#HoopHeroes #Spurs #NBA
